payload.answer: Sam’s professional transition to Point72 Ventures and updated jazz preferences (Coltrane) are durably recorded. The AI infrastructure article request is pending external fulfillment.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman Sachs last month and joined Point72 Ventures as of [current_date - 1 month].
Sam continues to listen to jazz, with a recent shift toward early Coltrane recordings alongside Bill Evans.
Sam requested Daniele to share an article related to AI infrastructure for follow-up discussion.
